title: Mayor Boodle Forgives the Straw Hats
description: On pages 14–17, Orange Town deals with the aftermath of Buggy’s defeat, while Luffy, Zoro, and Nami decide what they will carry away from the island.
scene: Buggy’s threat has been broken, but the town is still tense: the villagers, Mayor Boodle, Chouchou, and the Straw Hats all react to the damage left behind.

dialogue.speaker: Mayor Boodle
dialogue.text: Why are you siding with those pirates chief!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Are those kids just gonna dis- appear now!?

dialogue.speaker: Orange Town Villager
dialogue.text: Did they go to the Harbor!?

dialogue.speaker: Orange Town Villager
dialogue.text: Yes....!! They ran off in the direction of the harbor....!!

dialogue.speaker: Mayor Boodle
dialogue.text: Aah! Chief!!

dialogue.speaker: Mayor Boodle
dialogue.text: Dammit!!! Coming into my village and messing around and then leaving without my permission...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The number of things I have to say to you are piled like a mountain!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Okay, let's go!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hey, that flag has buggy's mark on it

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It was those pirates' boat so of course it does. I'll erase it later

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Furthermore, I

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I still have tons to say to you....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Furthermore, I

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Stop Right There You morons!!!

dialogue.speaker: Mayor Boodle
dialogue.text: Mister chief!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I really thought it was okay for me to die at that time....!!

dialogue.speaker: Mayor Boodle
dialogue.text: In my despair, I considered death to be nothing....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Pant.....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: PANT.....

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I'm sorry!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I owe you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Don't worry about it!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Just live Happy Lives!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I don't know how to express my grat- itude....!!

summary: The part closes the Orange Town conflict by shifting from combat to consequences: treasure, forgiveness, pride, and the Straw Hats’ departure.
